message:
fix(freeze): revert shared runtime helpers that had &_var_ref_list double-pointer bug

The compact codegen helpers (frozenCall, frozenCallMethod, frozenCallConstructor,
frozenGetField, frozenGetField2, exceptionCleanup, valueReturnCleanup) passed
"&_var_ref_list" which produced *const *ListHead instead of *ListHead, corrupting
GC linked list state and causing use-after-free TypeError crashes.

Revert to inline codegen for call/return/exception paths which accesses
_var_ref_list correctly. Remove all dead runtime helper functions (~300 lines).
Also revert cleanupLocals to simple JS_FreeValue (the defensive link_prev_ptr
check was masking the double-pointer bug, not fixing a real ref-count issue).

N=200 frozen TSC: 3.7s (unchanged), binary: 108MB.
